TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Philippines, title = Philippines, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Philippines} }

S.FORM: Philippines hya' ga cyux maki' tay 13 00 N, 122 00 E na Aziya' syuw. kwara' kinghciyan niya' 300,000 sq km (maki' tay 73ginkgan kin wahci') (kinwhci' niya' ga 298,170 sq km , kinwhci' na lawsayan wsilung hya' ga 1,830 sq km) Kinkhmayan kwara' squliq hya' ga 102,624,209. Pinbcyan naha' sni' naha' rhzyal hya' iy pqmahun hya' ga 41% , lhlahuy hya' ga 25.90%, sni' naha' sa pptzyuwaw sa bzinah hya' ga 33.10%. spzyang qalang na Kokka' spzyang naha' krahu' qalang hya' ga Manila. snyan kinramat inlungan na Kokka' snyan kinramat inlungan na Kokka' hya' ga 12 na tay mtzyu' byacing na qutux kawas. mrhuw Kokka' mrhuw Kokka' ta' misuw hya' ga Rodrigo Duterte, aring ryax 30 squ byacing tay 6 sa kawas 2016 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' CIA 外交部

Philippines hya' ga cyux maki' tay 13 00 N, 122 00 E na Aziya' syuw. kwara' kinghciyan niya' 300,000 sq km (maki' tay 73ginkgan kin wahci') (kinwhci' niya' ga 298,170 sq km , kinwhci' na lawsayan wsilung hya' ga 1,830 sq km) Kinkhmayan kwara' squliq hya' ga 102,624,209. Pinbcyan naha' sni' naha' rhzyal hya' iy pqmahun hya' ga 41% , lhlahuy hya' ga 25.90%, sni' naha' sa pptzyuwaw sa bzinah hya' ga 33.10%. spzyang qalang na Kokka' spzyang naha' krahu' qalang hya' ga Manila. snyan kinramat inlungan na Kokka' snyan kinramat inlungan na Kokka' hya' ga 12 na tay mtzyu' byacing na qutux kawas. mrhuw Kokka' mrhuw Kokka' ta' misuw hya' ga Rodrigo Duterte, aring ryax 30 squ byacing tay 6 sa kawas 2016 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' CIA 外交部
S.PHON: pħilippines~ɕ ħjaʔ ɣa ʦ~ʨjux makiʔ taj ** ** n, *** ** e na azijaʔ s~ɕjuw. kwaraʔ kiŋħʦ~ʨijan nijaʔ ***,*** s~ɕq km (makiʔ taj **ɣinkɣan kin waħʦ~ʨiʔ) (kinwħʦ~ʨiʔ nijaʔ ɣa ***,*** s~ɕq km , kinwħʦ~ʨiʔ na laws~ɕajan ws~ɕiluŋ ħjaʔ ɣa *,*** s~ɕq km) kinkħmajan kwaraʔ s~ɕquliq ħjaʔ ɣa ***,***,***. pinβʦ~ʨjan naħaʔ s~ɕniʔ naħaʔ rħzjal ħjaʔ ij pqmaħun ħjaʔ ɣa **% , lħlaħuj ħjaʔ ɣa **.**%, s~ɕniʔ naħaʔ s~ɕa pptzjuwaw s~ɕa βzinaħ ħjaʔ ɣa **.**%. s~ɕpzjaŋ qalaŋ na kokkaʔ s~ɕpzjaŋ naħaʔ kraħuʔ qalaŋ ħjaʔ ɣa manila. s~ɕnjan kinramat inluŋan na kokkaʔ s~ɕnjan kinramat inluŋan na kokkaʔ ħjaʔ ɣa ** na taj mtzjuʔ βjaʦ~ʨiŋ na qutux kawas~ɕ. mrħuw kokkaʔ mrħuw kokkaʔ taʔ mis~ɕuw ħjaʔ ɣa ro*riɣo *uterte, ariŋ rjax ** s~ɕqu βjaʦ~ʨiŋ taj * s~ɕa kawas~ɕ **** lɣa, mus~ɕaʔ s~ɕpazjaŋ βalaj ms~ɕʔrux kja la. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ ʦ~ʨia ***
